title: neomammillaria muehlenpfordtii var. hexispina
intro: Neomammillaria muehlenpfordtii var. hexispina, also known as the hexispin prickly pear cactus or hexispin mammillaria, is a type of cactus that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from pain and digestive discomfort. Herbal preparations of Neomammillaria muehlenpfordtii var. hexispina include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
